mapper.sql: id, title, excerpt, tag, content, record_date, images_json, view_count, pinned, status, agent_reply

where.if: AND (LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(excerpt) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%'))

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY pinned DESC,
record_date ASC title ASC record_date DESC
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM life_records WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT LEFT(record_date, 7) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM life_records
AND status = #{status}
AND record_date IS NOT NULL AND record_date != ''
GROUP BY LEFT(record_date, 7) ORDER BY month DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO life_records (id, title, excerpt, tag, content, record_date, images_json, view_count, pinned, status, agent_reply) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{excerpt}, #{tag}, #{content}, #{date}, #{imagesJson}, 0, 0, #{status}, #{agentReply})
mapper.update: UPDATE life_records SET title = #{title}, excerpt = #{excerpt}, tag = #{tag}, content = #{content}, record_date = #{date}, images_json = #{imagesJson}, status = #{status}, agent_reply = #{agentReply} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE life_records SET agent_reply = #{agentReply} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE life_records SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE life_records SET view_count = view_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT view_count FROM life_records WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE life_records SET pinned = #{pinned} WHERE id = #{id}
